# Container-HomeNetwork

```mermaid
graph LR
  linkStyle default fill:#ffffff

  subgraph diagram ["Container View: Home network"]
    style diagram fill:#ffffff,stroke:#ffffff

    23["<div style='font-weight: bold'>TP-Link DDNS</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Software System]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>alunduil.tplinkdns.com —<br />tracks the home WAN address.</div>"]
    style 23 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 40 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    style 41 fill:#999999,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#ffffff

    subgraph 28 ["Home network"]
      style 28 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#6b6b6b,color:#6b6b6b

        style group1 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#cccccc,color:#cccccc,stroke-dasharray:5

        style 39 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style group2 fill:#ffffff,stroke:#cccccc,color:#cccccc,stroke-dasharray:5

        style 29 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style 30 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
        31["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Tailscale subnet router</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: TrueNAS app]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Routes 192.168.68.0/24 over<br />Tailscale mesh</div>"]
        style 31 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style 32 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
        33["<div style='font-weight: bold'>Grafana Alloy</div><div style='font-size: 70%; margin-top: 0px'>[Container: TrueNAS app]</div><div style='font-size: 80%; margin-top:10px'>Telemetry collection agent</div>"]
        style 33 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style 34 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style 35 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff

        style 36 fill:#438dd5,stroke:#2e6295,color:#ffffff
